examples: Detective Holt said: "The kidnapper is a man we must catch and the sooner the better."
The British industrialist James Louis, held by kidnapper in central Africa for the past 8 months, was released unharmed yesterday.
Her kidnapper extorted a $175,000 ransom for her release.
He said he knew her alleged kidnapper -- Ariel Castro -- for many years as well.
She had been stolen for marriage but found her kidnapper was already married to somebody else.
